name: Sweet Almond
description: Lightweight and rich in vitamins A and E, this oil is great for moisturizing and soothing the skin.

name: Grapeseed
description: Fast-absorbing and rich in linoleic acid, this oil helps balance oil production while offering light hydration.

name: Jamaican Black Castor
description: Thick and nourishing, this oil is known for its ability to promote hair growth and strengthen follicles.

name: Avocado
description: Thick and deeply moisturizing, this oil is rich in vitamins and great for dry or damaged hair and skin.

name: Sunflower
description: A mild, non-irritating oil that is high in vitamin E, making it great for sensitive skin and easily absorbed without leaving a greasy feel.

name: Olive
description: Deeply moisturizing, packed with antioxidants, great for dry skin, scalp nourishment, and natural conditioning.

name: Argan
description: Often called liquid gold, this oil is rich in fatty acids and vitamin E, making it perfect for hair and skin hydration.

name: Jojoba
description: Structurally similar to the skin's natural sebu, this oil helps regulate moisture and is great for all skin types.

name: Coconut
description: A classic multi-tasker with antimicrobial benefits, this oil provides deep hydration and leaves a protective barrier on skin and hair.

name: Hempseed
description: Non-comedogenic and high in omega-3 & 6, this lightweight oil is great for calming inflammation and balancing oily skin.

name: Flaxseed
description: Loaded with omega-3 fatty acids, this oil helps calm and soothe skin, while supporting hydration and elasticity.

name: Rosehip
description: Known for it's regenerative properties, this oil supports skin repair and is rich in vitamins A and C.

name: Baobab
description: Rich in omega fatty acids, this oil is deepy hydrating and helps improve skin elasticity.

name: Marula
description: A luxurious, fast-absorbing oil packed with antioxidants, ideal for hydrating and protecting skin and hair.

name: Amla
description: Traditionally used in Ayurvedic care, amla oil helps strengthen hair, reduce breakage, and nourish the scalp.

name: Tea Tree
description: A naturally purifying oil with antimicrobial properties, tea tree is commonly used to help clarify skin and support scalp health.

name: Rosemary
description: An invigorating oil often used to stimulate circulation and promotte hair and scalp vitality.

name: Peppermint
description: Refreshing and cooling, this oil is commonly used for its stimulating scent and soothing properties.
